blockingIssues.description: src/runtime/render.ts rewrites timestamps.updatedAt to createdAt for render comparison, causing stale/incorrect markdown metadata and breaking rendering correctness.
tests/runtime/render-snapshot.test.ts normalizes timestamps before comparison, so byte-identical parity is not actually enforced for VAL-PERF-008.
tests/cross-area/markdown-parity.test.ts also normalizes timestamps, weakening VAL-CROSS-008 byte-level parity verification.
Prepared-workspace mkdir optimization is not implemented to contract: mkdir calls still scale with save count due to repeated calls in saveSession/render paths.
tests/runtime/workspace-cache.test.ts asserts an incorrect mkdir threshold (30) instead of the required <= 2, so the contract behavior is not validated.

scripts/cross-area/bundle-sanity.mjs creates a mocked @opencode-ai/plugin package but imports repo dist/index.js without resolver wiring, so Node resolves the real repo dependency instead of the mock shim.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add an explicit assertion-evidence check: when contract language requires byte-identical parity or exact thresholds, tests must use literal byte/threshold assertions (no normalization or broadened thresholds).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: m5-incremental-renderer and m5-read-cache-mkdir both reported followedProcedure=true while introducing weakened validations (normalized markdown parity and mkdir threshold 30 vs <=2).

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: For M5-tagged features, require explicit bench execution evidence in handoff command logs (including bun run bench when the feature contract references benchmark gates).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: m5-bundle-optimization handoff omitted bun run bench despite M5 skill guidance requiring full benchmark execution and results alignment checks.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document exact peer-dependency shim wiring for dist bundle smoke tests (e.g., resolver setup / NODE_PATH / cwd strategy) so mocked peer loading is actually validated.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: m5-bundle-optimization smoke checks created local @opencode-ai/plugin stubs but imported dist from repo path, allowing resolution from repo node_modules instead of mock host shims.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a verification-only feature pattern (including acceptable empty-commit handoff expectations) for gate features that intentionally ship no code diff.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: m5-perf-gate succeeded as a validation-only feature with an empty commit, but this workflow is not clearly documented in the current procedure.

rejectedObservations.observation: VAL-CROSS-008 fixture path mismatch in validation-contract.md versus current fixture layout.
rejectedObservations.reason: out_of_scope_for_shared_state: this is a mission-contract content correction, not a services.yaml/library operational update.
